title: ERD Discovery — From/To Relationship Explorer
story: As a DataTools Pro user who is not deeply familiar with Salesforce, I want to click on an ERD object and use From/To dropdowns to discover which objects are related in each direction, so that I can quickly understand entity relationships without visually parsing the entire diagram.
description:
Adds a relationship discovery feature to the ERD. When a user clicks on an object, a discovery panel appears above the diagram with "From" and "To" dropdowns.

- **From**: Shows objects that the selected object references outbound (objects this object points to)
- **To**: Shows objects that reference the selected object inbound (objects that point to this one)

Selecting a direction highlights the relevant related objects in the diagram, making it visually clear which objects are connected and in what direction.

For example, selecting Account (PBO):
- **From**: Only Lead appears (Lead references Account via ConvertedAccountId)
- **To**: Campaign Member, Contact, Lead, User, and Opportunity appear (these objects have foreign keys pointing to Account)

This feature targets users who know little about Salesforce data models and need a simple, guided way to understand entity relationships.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking an ERD object opens a discovery panel with From and To dropdown options
Selecting 'From' highlights objects the selected object references outbound
Selecting 'To' highlights objects that reference the selected object inbound
Highlighted objects are visually distinct from non-related objects
The discovery panel shifts content down to avoid overlapping the diagram
The From/To logic correctly reflects inbound vs outbound field relationships
ux_changes: New discovery panel appears above the ERD diagram on object click. From/To dropdowns highlight related objects directionally. Content shifts down to accommodate the panel.
middleware_changes: Logic to compute inbound (To) and outbound (From) related objects based on the foreign key metadata for the selected object.
implementation_notes: Developer initially questioned the From/To direction labels — the description had them reversed. Confirmed that 'To' means objects that reference the selected object (inbound). The feature targets non-technical users who need guided relationship discovery.
comment_summary: Developer noted the From/To direction was reversed in the original description and asked for clarification. Confirmed 'To' = inbound references. Implemented on local with screenshots, then deployed to development for review.
